Dear Hiring Team,

I'm applying for the Software Engineer role at PwC Singapore. Your focus on building reusable solutions and using Power Automate to solve internal challenges aligns perfectly with my background in technical automation and workflow optimization.

I built an automated job search pipeline hosted on a VPS using n8n and AI agents. I also developed ValoFenua, a platform that uses a daily scraper for 1,300+ listings and feeds them into an AI agent to calculate price estimates. These projects show my ability to handle the full data lifecycle, from ingestion to automated decision logic.

At my current role with EXAIL Robotics, I redesigned the software installation process. It used to take about 2 days of manual work. I automated it so it now takes 2 hours. This was an 85% reduction in deployment time and made the process accessible to the whole team.

I am finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering and I'm ready to help Gajabuja scale its data architecture. I'm particularly interested in how your optimization logic directly impacts game monetization and player retention.

Aodren Gloux

stack: C++, Software Engineering, Automation
points_positifs: Poste spécifique en C++ correspondant parfaitement aux compétences actuelles
Entreprise en hyper-croissance (joint-venture NXP/VIS)
Ouvert aux profils universitaires récents
points_negatifs: Événement de recrutement ciblé sur un campus spécifique (SIT Punggol)
Besoin de visa non mentionné
commentaire: VSMC est une nouvelle usine de semi-conducteurs majeure à Singapour. Ils recrutent activement des profils C++ et Automation pour leur infrastructure de fabrication intelligente.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am applying for the Software Engineer (C++) role at VSMC. I saw your recruitment drive for the new 300mm wafer facility and I am interested in contributing to your intelligent manufacturing systems.

I currently develop core features in C++ and JavaScript at EXAIL Robotics, where I work on high-precision eye-tracking systems. I also redesigned the installation process at my current company. It used to take about 2 days, but now it takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. This 85% reduction in deployment time shows my focus on efficiency and automation.

In my personal time, I built ValoFenua, a full-stack platform using React and PostgreSQL. It includes a daily scraper and an AI pipeline to process market data. I enjoy solving complex problems where software meets industrial hardware requirements.

I am finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering in 2024. I would welcome the chance to discuss how my C++ experience can support VSMC's ramp-up in Singapore.

Aodren Gloux

stack: Linux core, Python, Bash, Docker, Kubernetes, Ansible, Terraform, AWS/GCP/Azure, Slurm, SQL
points_positifs: Poste orienté automation et infrastructure système, ce qui correspond à l'expérience C++/Linux/Python du candidat
Niveau 'Entry level' officiellement affiché sur LinkedIn
Entreprise de trading haute fréquence prestigieuse qui valorise l'optimisation extrême
points_negatifs: L'offre demande 1 à 5 ans d'expérience, Aodren se situe dans la fourchette basse
Forte composante HPC/Storage qui n'est pas le cœur initial de son profil
Sponsorship de visa non spécifié
commentaire: L'offre est à la limite entre le dev et l'infra (Systems Engineering). C'est une excellente opportunité pour un profil junior qui aime l'automatisation et les systèmes Linux complexes. Le score est de 7 car la dimension 'HPC' est très spécifique.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I'm applying for the Systems Engineer role at Tower Research Capital. I have a strong background in Linux systems and a focus on removing manual bottlenecks, which aligns with your search for engineers to automate HPC workflows.

I currently develop features in C++ and JavaScript at EXAIL Robotics, where I also manage product maintenance in a Linux environment. On my own time, I built an automated job search pipeline using n8n and an MCP server, showing my ability to integrate different APIs and handle containerized workloads with Docker. I enjoy the challenge of making complex systems more efficient through code and scripting.

I also redesigned the installation process at my current company. It used to take about 2 days. Now it takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. That's an 85% reduction in deployment time. This is the kind of operational efficiency I want to bring to Tower's infrastructure teams.

I'm finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering (2026). I've followed Tower's reputation for low-latency innovation and would welcome the chance to support your trading platforms. 

Aodren Gloux
